title: Error
description: Protocol-owned shared error envelope family for trust-boundary failures with stable code taxonomy, retry posture, and typed details.

schema_id.description: Stable protocol object-family identifier for shared error envelopes.

schema_version.description: Exact protocol schema version used to validate this error object.

code.description: Machine-consumed error code from the dedicated error.code registry. Runtime enforcement must validate this value against the active error.code registry.

category.description: High-level failure category used for consistent boundary handling and UI treatment.

retryable.description: Whether the caller may safely retry the failed operation without changing the request shape.

message.description: Human-facing non-sensitive error summary associated with the stable error code.

details_schema_id.description: Schema identifier for an optional typed details payload associated with this error.

details.description: Optional structured error details payload whose shape is defined by details_schema_id.
